title: Sector and Campaign Progression Flow
interaction_flow: Player → PlanetDialog: show() [opens campaign planet map; sets launchSector = Vars.state.getSector()]
PlanetDialog → Planet: getSector(ray) [each frame on hover to detect hovered sector]
PlanetDialog → Planet: selectable(planet) [checks mode == look/select/planetLaunch to filter planets]
Player → PlanetDialog: click sector → selectSector(sector) → updateSelected()
PlanetDialog → SectorInfo: reads sector.info.{production, export, imports, resources, attempts, wave, icon, contentIcon} for panel display
PlanetDialog: builds sector panel — shows launch/go/resume button based on sector.hasBase()/mode
Player → PlanetDialog: clicks launch button → playSelected()
PlanetDialog: findLauncher(sector) → checks planet.generator.findLaunchCandidate() and launchSector validity
PlanetDialog → LaunchLoadoutDialog: loadouts.show(coreType, from, sector, callback) [if launching to new sector with base available]
Player → LaunchLoadoutDialog: selects schematic loadout → triggers callback
PlanetDialog → Sector(from): from.removeItems(loadout.requirements()); from.removeItems(universe.getLaunchResources())
PlanetDialog → Events: fire SectorLaunchLoadoutEvent(sector, from, loadout)
PlanetDialog → renderer: renderer.showLaunch(core) [launch animation]
PlanetDialog → Control: control.playSector(from, sector) [after animation delay]
Control → SaveSlot: saves.getCurrent().save(); saves.resetSave()
Control → Planet: sector.planet.setLastSector(sector) [persists last-visited sector to settings]
Control: [if sector has save slot] → slot.load(world.makeSectorContext(sector))
SaveVersion.load() → Planet: state.rules.sector.planet.applyRules(state.rules) [re-applies planet rules after loading save]
Control: [if no save / corrupted / no base] → playNewSector(origin, sector, reloader, params, beforePlay)
Control(playNewSector) → World: world.loadSector(sector, params)
World.loadSector() → Planet: sector.planet.applyRules(state.rules)
Planet.applyRules(rules): ruleSetter.get(rules) [custom planet rule lambda], rules.attributes = defaultAttributes, rules.env = defaultEnv, rules.planet = this
Planet.applyRules() → CampaignRules: campaignRules.apply(this, rules) [if !customGame]

CampaignRules.apply() → Rules: sets rules.fog/staticFog, showSpawns, randomWaveAI, pauseDisabled, objectiveTimerMultiplier; sets waveTeam TeamRule: blockHealth/unitHealth/unitCostMultiplier from Difficulty
World.loadSector() → SectorInfo: sector.info.resources = content.toSeq() [collects available resource content]
Control(playNewSector): state.rules.sector = sector; sector.info.origin = origin; sector.info.destination = origin; sector.info.attempts++
Control(playNewSector) → Logic: logic.play()
Control(playNewSector) → SaveSlot: control.saves.saveSector(sector)
Control(playNewSector) → Events: fire SectorLaunchEvent(sector), Trigger.newGame
Control(playNewSector) → GameState: state.set(State.playing)
Logic: on SaveLoadEvent (campaign) → SectorInfo: info.write() [syncs sector info into state.rules: waves, waveSpacing, winWave, attackMode, items→core]
Logic(SaveLoadEvent) → Planet: state.getSector().planet.applyRules(state.rules) [re-applies after save load]
SectorInfo.write() → Rules: state.rules.waves = waves, waveSpacing, winWave, attackMode; restores core items from info.items
[Each game frame] → SectorInfo.update(): refreshes export/import/production rolling means every 60 ticks
SectorInfo: handleCoreItem(item, amount) accumulates coreDeltas; handleProduction() accumulates productionDeltas; handleItemExport/Import() increments counters
[On game save] → SectorInfo: prepare(sector) — snapshots core items, wave/attack state, hasCore, bestCoreType, storageCapacity, light coverage → sector.saveInfo()
SectorInfo.prepare() → PlanetGenerator: sector.planet.generator.beforeSaveWrite(sector)
SectorInfo.eachImport(planet, cons): iterates planet.sectors to find sectors whose info.destination points to this sector with active exports
key_relationships: PlanetDialog depends_on Planet — reads sectors, calls getSector(ray), selectable(planet), setLastSector, launchCandidates, applyRules
PlanetDialog depends_on SectorInfo — reads production/export/imports/resources/icon for display panel
PlanetDialog depends_on Control — calls control.playSector(origin, sector) to start gameplay
PlanetDialog depends_on LaunchLoadoutDialog — shows loadout selection before launch
Planet owns CampaignRules campaignRules — loaded from settings, applied per sector launch
SaveVersion.load() calls Planet.applyRules(state.rules) on campaign save load
Logic SaveLoadEvent calls SectorInfo.write() then Planet.applyRules(state.rules)
SectorInfo.write() mutates Rules (waves, waveSpacing, winWave, attackMode, core items)
SectorInfo.prepare(sector) snapshots GameState into SectorInfo fields, calls sector.saveInfo()

PlanetDialog.key_fields: selected: Sector, hovered: Sector, launchSector: Sector, launchCandidates: Seq<Planet>, mode: Mode (look/select/planetLaunch), launching: boolean, listener: Cons<Sector>
PlanetDialog.key_methods: show(), showSelect(sector, listener), showPlanetLaunch(sector, launchCandidates, listener), selectSector(sector), updateSelected(), playSelected(), findLauncher(sector), canSelect(sector), viewPlanet(planet, pan), rebuildList()

Planet.key_fields: sectors: Seq<Sector>, grid: PlanetGrid, generator: PlanetGenerator, campaignRules: CampaignRules, campaignRuleDefaults: CampaignRules, ruleSetter: Cons<Rules>, defaultEnv: int, defaultAttributes: Attributes, launchCandidates: Seq<Planet>
Planet.key_methods: applyRules(rules), applyRules(rules, customGame), applyDefaultRules(rules), loadRules(), saveRules(), getSector(ray), getStartSector(), getLastSector(), setLastSector(sector), hasGrid(), init()

SectorInfo.key_fields: production: ObjectMap<Item,ExportStat>, rawProduction: ObjectMap<Item,ExportStat>, export: ObjectMap<Item,ExportStat>, imports: ObjectMap<Item,ExportStat>, items: ItemSeq, destination: Sector, origin: Sector, resources: Seq<UnlockableContent>, wave: int, waves: boolean, attack: boolean, hasCore: boolean, spawnPosition: int, attempts: int
SectorInfo.key_methods: write() [syncs to state.rules+core], prepare(sector) [snapshots state to info], update() [refreshes stats every 60t], handleCoreItem(item,amount), handleItemExport(item,amount), handleItemImport(item,amount), eachImport(planet,cons), refreshImportRates(planet), importStats(planet)

CampaignRules.key_fields: difficulty: Difficulty, fog: boolean, showSpawns: boolean, sectorInvasion: boolean, randomWaveAI: boolean, rtsAI: boolean, clearSectorOnLose: boolean, pauseDisabled: boolean
CampaignRules.key_methods: apply(planet, rules) [sets fog, difficulty multipliers, rtsAI on waveTeam TeamRule]

Rules.key_fields: sector: Sector, planet: Planet, env: int, attributes: Attributes, waves: boolean, attackMode: boolean, fog: boolean, waveSpacing: float, winWave: int, teams: TeamRules, spawns: Seq<SpawnGroup>
Rules.notes: Pure configuration object — does not store game state. Set by Planet.applyRules() and SectorInfo.write()

signatures: public void playSector(@Nullable Sector origin, Sector sector)
void playSector(@Nullable Sector origin, Sector sector, WorldReloader reloader)
public void playNewSector(@Nullable Sector origin, Sector sector, WorldReloader reloader)
public void playNewSector(@Nullable Sector origin, Sector sector, WorldReloader reloader, WorldParams params, @Nullable Runnable beforePlay)
Control.playSector.notes: playSector checks for existing save slot; playNewSector generates fresh world. applyRules called inside world.loadSector. sector.info.attempts incremented in playNewSector.

important_notes: PlanetDialog has 3 modes: look (default browsing), select (pick a destination sector), planetLaunch (interplanetary accelerator)
Planet.applyRules() is called in THREE places: (1) World.loadSector() for new sector generation, (2) SaveVersion.load() when loading an existing save, (3) Logic.SaveLoadEvent handler after load
SectorInfo.write() pushes persisted sector metadata INTO the live state.rules (waves/wave/attackMode/items), called on save load event
SectorInfo.prepare() pulls live game state INTO SectorInfo for persistence, called before save
CampaignRules are persisted per-planet in settings as '{planetName}-campaign-rules' JSON; player can edit via CampaignRulesDialog if planet.allowCampaignRules == true
Rules.planet field links the active ruleset to its source planet; Rules.sector links to active Sector
Export/import flow: SectorInfo.eachImport() scans all planet.sectors for sectors where info.destination == this and info.anyExports()
sector.info.destination and sector.info.origin are set at playNewSector time to the launch-from sector
